lessons.title: Nunca colapsar claim + complete
lessons.mistake: Agente emitiu complete sem claim previo; tarefa nao transita corretamente.
lessons.rule: Cada invocacao emite exatamente uma action. claim e complete sao outputs separados.

lessons.title: file_updates exige action=complete
lessons.mistake: file_updates emitido com claim/review/issue.report; nao deveria existir.
lessons.rule: Todo file_updates DEVE acompanhar action=complete; outros actions sao rejeitados.

lessons.title: prior_status obrigatorio e coerente
lessons.mistake: prior_status omitido ou divergente do status real do roadmap.
lessons.rule: prior_status e obrigatorio em todo output e deve refletir o status do roadmap.

payload.title: Documentar recursos do ESAA e guia de uso com Codex/Claude Code
payload.description: Produzir documentacao de uso do ESAA cobrindo: (1) referencia de cada subcomando do CLI esaa (bootstrap, init, run, submit, claim, complete, review, state, dispatch-context, reject, task, issue, hotfix, activity, process, project, verify, chain, eligible, metrics, input, plugin, roadmap, plugin-status, effects, runner, scenario, vocabulary, snapshot, replay) com proposito, sintaxe e exemplo; (2) guia pratico de como usar o ESAA num projeto novo (bootstrap/init ate o ciclo todo->in_progress->review->done); (3) guia de como operar Codex e Claude Code como runners externos (provenance --runner, dispatch-context, input commands/runtime_capabilities, runner metrics, envelope agent.result e two-step claim/complete); (4) motivacao: porque usar o ESAA e quais problemas cada recurso resolve (tabela recurso/para-que-serve/problema-que-resolve).

payload.notes: Claim para producao dos 4 guias de uso do ESAA em docs/guides/

4 guias de uso do ESAA criados em docs/guides/: referencia completa do CLI (29 subcomandos), primeiros passos, operacao de Codex/Claude Code como runners e motivacao (porque usar / problemas que resolve)

checks: docs/guides/esaa-cli-reference.md documenta os 29 subcomandos do esaa --help real (0.5.0b9) com proposito, sintaxe e exemplos, incluindo state, process, scenario, vocabulary e reject
docs/guides/esaa-getting-started.md cobre instalacao via pip, bootstrap/init e o ciclo completo todo->in_progress->review->done com exemplos executaveis

docs/guides/esaa-runners-codex-claude-code.md cobre provenance --runner, input commands/runtime_capabilities, dispatch-context, envelope agent.result, two-step claim/complete, gates WG-001..005 e runner metrics
docs/guides/esaa-why.md apresenta a tabela recurso/para-que-serve/problema-que-resolve cobrindo todos os recursos do core

payload.title: Specify task lessons and typed review model
payload.description: Criar docs/spec/G07-task-lessons-review-model.md como especificacao canonica, backward-compatible, para evoluir task model, lessons e review tipado. A spec deve definir task_type, acceptance_criteria, required_review_mode, supersedes e superseded_by; Projection Rules; Validation Timing; Lessons Contract; Canonical Examples; Non-Goals. A entrega e documental: nao implementar core nesta task.

payload.notes: Spec G07 documental criada para task model, lessons e review tipado; sem implementacao do core nesta task.

checks: Spec contains Projection Rules for supersedes and projection-only superseded_by
Spec contains Validation Timing requiring invalid task.create/review inputs to fail before append
Spec contains Lessons Contract with status, scope filtering and enforcement shape
Spec contains Canonical Examples for task, superseded task, typed review and typed lesson
Spec contains Non-Goals excluding core implementation and roadmap migration from this task

payload.notes: Spec G07 refinada apos review: required_verification no exemplo de dispatch-context usa objeto checks; exemplos declaram nomenclatura canonica ESAA-Core; backward compatibility cobre normalizacao de lessons legadas.

checks: Dispatch-context example represents required_verification as an object with checks rather than a bare array
Canonical Examples section states examples use current ESAA-Core names task_id, task_kind, task.create and action review
Backward Compatibility states legacy lessons shapes are accepted and normalized internally without manual migration
Spec still contains Projection Rules, Validation Timing, Lessons Contract, Canonical Examples and Non-Goals

payload.title: Implement G07 schema contracts
payload.description: Implementar a camada de schema da G07 conforme docs/spec/G07-task-lessons-review-model.md. Atualizar schemas/templates para aceitar campos opcionais backward-compatible de task e review: task_type, acceptance_criteria, required_review_mode, supersedes e review_mode. Nao implementar ainda regras completas de projector/CLI alem do necessario para os schemas e testes de schema. Validar que roadmaps/eventos antigos continuam aceitos e que enums invalidas falham no schema apropriado.

payload.title: Implement G07 task model projection and task create CLI
payload.description: Implementar os campos opcionais de task da G07 no fluxo task.create e no projector. task create deve aceitar --task-type, --acceptance-criterion repetivel, --required-review-mode e --supersedes repetivel. O projector deve preservar campos autorados e derivar superseded_by como lista projection-only em ordem de eventos. Validacoes: supersedes exige task existente no momento do task.create, rejeita self-reference e duplicados antes de append; supersedes nao altera status da task referenciada; campos ausentes nao viram null incompatibil. Manter compatibilidade com eventos antigos.

payload.title: Implement G07 typed review mode validation
payload.description: Implementar review tipado conforme G07. O CLI review deve aceitar --review-mode opcional. Se a task possuir required_review_mode, todo review approve ou request_changes deve informar review_mode igual; ausencia, divergencia ou enum invalida deve falhar antes de append e nao gerar evento. Se a task nao exigir modo, review_mode valido pode ser informado e deve ser preservado no evento para replay/auditoria. Atualizar validator/projector conforme necessario mantendo compatibilidade com reviews antigos sem review_mode.

payload.title: Implement G07 lessons contract and dispatch context
payload.description: Implementar o contrato de lessons e dispatch-context da G07. Atualizar lessons.schema para status active, experimental, superseded e archived; scope com task_kinds, task_types, review_modes, paths, actors e runners; enforcement como objeto extensivel com mode/value e compatibilidade com shape legado. Implementar filtro: OR dentro da mesma dimensao e AND entre dimensoes. active entra no contexto e pode bloquear; experimental entra sem bloquear por padrao; superseded/archived nao entram no contexto normal. dispatch-context deve expor campos G07 para spec/impl/qa, incluindo superseded_by como dado de leitura. require_boundary_grant deve ser documentado/representado sem conceder permissao automaticamente.

payload.title: Document G07 task model and typed review usage
payload.description: Atualizar documentacao de usuario apos a implementacao G07. Documentar uso de task create com task_type, acceptance_criteria, required_review_mode e supersedes; uso de review --review-mode; comportamento de superseded_by projection-only; lessons status/scope/enforcement; compatibilidade com roadmaps e lessons legadas. Nao alterar core nesta task.

payload.title: QA G07 task model lessons and typed review implementation
payload.description: Validar a implementacao completa da G07 contra docs/spec/G07-task-lessons-review-model.md. Cobrir compatibilidade com eventos/roadmaps antigos, campos opcionais sem null incompativel, task create com campos novos, supersedes/superseded_by, review_mode em approve e request_changes, nao append em entradas invalidas, dispatch-context com campos G07, lessons active/experimental/superseded/archived e filtro OR por dimensao/AND entre dimensoes. Rodar PYTHONPATH=src pytest -q e esaa --root . verify.

payload.notes: Implemented G07 schema layer only: roadmap task schema accepts optional G07 task fields; agent_result review schema accepts optional review_mode; added focused schema contract tests. No projector, CLI, or semantic pre-append validation implemented in this task.

agent_result.schema.json accepts review_mode for review events and rejects invalid review_mode enum

supersedes validation rejects missing targets, self-reference and duplicates before append without changing event count

payload.notes: Implemented G07 typed review mode: review accepts optional review_mode, required_review_mode is enforced for approve and request_changes before append, valid optional review_mode is preserved, and replay/verify applies the same rule.

payload.title: Full pytest regression after G07 completion

evidence.symptom: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q fails after all G07 tasks are done: task_admin.py has 565 lines over the 500-line service decomposition limit and filter_lessons no longer accepts the legacy task_kind keyword used by existing tests.
